metadata.description: Effectful test cases for hydra.lib.effects primitives

literal.string: apply applies an effectful function to an effectful argument
bind threads a pure value into the next effect
compose runs two Kleisli arrows in sequence
foldl sequences an effect-returning step over a list
map applies a pure function to an effect result
mapList applies an effect-returning function across a list and collects results
mapOptional over a present value applies the function
pure of a string yields the string
Effectful test cases for hydra.lib.effects primitives
